reviews.review_description:
played for a while now and even only playing with bots have had more fun then most other shooter games would recommend


Also can’t wait for the zombies game mode

Lovely crisp, smooth graphics, characterful NPCs and varied locations. Gameplay is so engaging, can't put it down.
Thought everything had gone quiet with this one since the demo came out several years ago. Shame it's not been more widely promoted, so giving it 5 worthy stars to hopefully shove it into the "Top Rated" status where it might get more attention.
Don't worry that there's no one playing online right now, single player is brilliant!

There is absolutely nothing wrong with this game except for maybe the cost and the fact that it is dead. However it would probaly make the game more popular if you were to release this on steam and make a pc version then once you have that worked put perhaps experiment with cross platform servers. The only problem would be random toxic people taking the innocence out of the game but then maybe just don’t do cross platform if that happens. Other than that this is probaly one of the best games on the vr platform including every other game. The character models have more detail than humanly possible and the gameplay is really fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your feedback! Yeah, it's really tough to stand out on Meta's platform if your game isn't a copy of ape-tag and your not another Horizon Worlds game. Just being honest. We've worked so hard for so long to make the gameplay solid and the art smooth af, so we appreciate you recognizing that - it means a lot, thank you. We have looked into Steam, and it is in the works rn, but will likely be mid 2026.

reviews.review_description: I've been playing this for a long time now, while it was still in demo mode waiting for it to be finished, and it was well worth the wait.  I am really enjoying this shooter game. You can play single with A.I. robots or with a group up to 4 total. Team of 4 against a team of four. They have added so many locations to play in, so many gun, grenade and melee weapon upgrades.  They took a good game and made it great!  I was having so much fun that I lost track of time and my Q3 battery and the BOBO extra battery drained down to almost nothing.

This is a fantastic game. It fits into a niche that no other VR shooters occupy.

Gameplay is fast-paced and frantic, but it's also incredibly well balanced and strategic.

The game mechanics work so well in VR. The controls are very accessible and easy to pick up, but difficult to master.

The graphics are crisp and clear, and the performance is great. It's very well optimized.

The art style and map design are very well developed. 

It's clear that HAX is meant to be a game, not a sim, and the devs did a great job implementing fun gameplay AND competitive elements.

In fact, this game has everything it needs to become one of the top competitive VR shooters or an esport, but it's also fun to play single player against bots. 

I highly reccomend picking this one up. I've gotten my money's worth!

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you so much for your kind comments and 5-star review! We're delighted to see how much you're enjoying the game, really appreciate it ❤️‍🔥

reviews.review_description: Been playing since this game was in very early stages, and it’s real good. Guns feel punchy and the mechanics work really well, and everything is very customizable for settings. Full body looks great and it’s just a really fun shooter. Please get this we need more players in multiplayer!
I love this game and while there are things to improve it’s amazing for being in early access I just hope you all keep adding things to the game and the only major issue is the bots

Absolutely amazing game, innovative in the VR fps scene with developers that have real passion for what they make. Tons of weapons and different ways to approach the game, customization, responsive controls, beautifully crafted maps and lobby's. 10/10, highly recommend for anyone looking for a unique and new VR FPS experience

reviews.review_title: The most fun I’ve ever had in VR
reviews.review_description:
An incredibly unique take on VRFPS full of simple yet amazing features and systems

The guns are all so different from each other in so many ways, with attachments that make literally any conceivable playstyle a reality, and such a wide amount of stats to balance around and keep the meta shifting

The grenades feel just as good as the guns to use, and help make even more playstyles possible while opening up for some really creative kills like setting traps or shooting your own grenade out of the air to flush someone out of cover

The melee weapons are a bit simpler but even they have some nuances and playstyles, it’s even possible to play without guns entirely and just go crazy with a sword

And it’s all packaged with great stylized graphics, butter smooth performance, and the absolute best networking system I’ve seen since I first started playing VR. Those “how did that hit me” deaths and no-reg bullets almost never happen here, even in high ping scenarios

This is the most fun I have ever had in a VRFPS and quite possibly the most fun I’ve had in VR, and unlike so many other games, this one truly feels built for VR

Fast paced with clever mechanics. A great spin on what a shooter could be with brilliantly implemented ideas and a new way to do magazines. From the maps to the lobbies this game oozes with fun art style and has great vibes. Very reminiscent of old fps games like Halo. A must try VR title if you’re a fan of shooters!

reviews.review_title: HAX and its development is insane
reviews.review_description: I have been following the development of this game for about 4 years now, and this is just about everything I ever wanted. It has a way to go, yes, still needs more game modes and AI, but for release, it's pretty much everything it needs to be. Good balance, great gameplay, amazing art style, and I'm in it. What more could I possibly ask for? 10/10 do recommend this game, my favorite shooter on this headset. If you like Vail or Contractors, you'll probably love this game. Join the discord if you can't find a lobby near you!!!

reviews.review_title: I missed this game so much!
reviews.review_description:
i loved the demo, i thought the game was abandoned!

I have one request though, will there be a bot gamemode? i want to play when there is no others online

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing! We appreciate the feedback. Bots are now back in the game, hop in there and give it a try

reviews.review_title: After HAX, the world will be quaint.
reviews.review_description: This is a game that holds a very special place in my heart; it might not be the most popular out here but it sure is one of the best, I remember playing HAX Demo for hours before this came out. I hope seeing the return of singleplayer very soon!
Great game, really fun, good mechanics, fun. But the game needs bot mode

developer_response.body: Hey CKnobel, Bots are back and ready for combat!

reviews.review_description: This game is fun but I really wish this game had more players. I really hope this game becomes famous
I hope more people find this, though there is usually a lobby at 8 pm. This is my favorite VR shooter so far and I am looking forward to how it grows!
this is prob the best fast paced shooter on vr. you should def buy!!!
10/10 one of the beat vr games you'll find this year. Large selection of guns and probably more to come. Cheak of discord to help you find a game near you!
